cases.evaluator_notes: Technically flawless. Found edge cases immediately in the coding test. However, during the behavioral interview, when asked about a past failure, they blamed 'incompetent product managers'. When the interviewer challenged a design choice, the candidate became visibly agitated and condescending.

Very strong. Unprompted, brought up an incident where a migration they led took down production for 20 minutes. Explicitly stated 'I didn't account for lock contention.' Detailed the exact post-mortem steps and how they updated the internal Golden Paths so no junior dev could make the same mistake.
